title: Senior Frontend Developer at Housing.com International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Housing.com International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Housing.com International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Housing.com International Enterprises:
Housing.com International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com International Enterprises!
jsonLd.skills: SQL, JavaScript, Python, Microservices, MongoDB, Git, Rust, Machine Learning
